CREATE TABLE timestamps_table AS SELECT range(TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10', TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-11', INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AS time_stamps;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id INT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO another_table (id, created_at) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10 00:00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10 01:00:00'), (3, TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10 02:00:00');

SELECT a.id, a.created_at, r.time_stamps FROM another_table a JOIN (SELECT range(TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10', TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10 02:30:00', INTERVAL 30 MINUTE) AS time_stamps) r ON a.created_at < r.time_stamps;
CREATE TABLE time_ranges AS SELECT range(TIMESTAMPTZ '2000-12-31 23:30:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-01-01 00:30:00', INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS time_stamps;
SELECT time_stamps FROM time_ranges WHERE time_stamps < TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-01-01 00:00:00';
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO events (event_id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10 12:00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10 12:45:00');

SELECT e.event_id, r.time_stamps FROM events e JOIN (SELECT range(TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10 12:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10 13:00:00', INTERVAL '15 MINUTE') AS time_stamps) r ON e.event_time BETWEEN r.time_stamps AND r.time_stamps + INTERVAL '15 MINUTE';

CREATE TABLE complex_query AS SELECT e.event_id, e.event_time, r.time_stamps FROM events e, (SELECT range(TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-10', TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-11', INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AS time_stamps) r WHERE e.event_time >= r.time_stamps;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complex_query WHERE time_stamps < TIMESTAMPTZ '2001-04-11 00:00:00';
